canonical_definition: A multimodal benchmark for Chinese pun memes that assesses vision-language models on pun detection, sentiment analysis, and contextual meme response selection using annotated memes and simulated chat conversations.
papers: Retrieval over Classification: Integrating Relation Semantics for Multimodal Relation Extraction

definitions.text: A multimodal benchmark for Chinese pun memes that assesses vision-language models on pun detection, sentiment analysis, and contextual meme response selection using annotated memes and simulated chat conversations.
definitions.paper: Retrieval over Classification: Integrating Relation Semantics for Multimodal Relation Extraction
